creator: d.toschlaeger@gmail.com
text:
Hello
after installing the gnome gamin monitor for file changes in a configured directory via pkg as a dependency for samba413" I found that the URL to it's creators tips for configuration has changed. The pkg info for gamin directs to 

www.gnome.org/~veillard/gamin/config.html

but it has been moved to:

people.gnome.org/~veillard/gamin/config.html

That's all.


Kind regards
Daniel
